name: @agentxchain/openclaw-plugin
description: Expose AgentXchain governance actions (step, accept-turn, approve-transition) as OpenClaw skills.

tools.name: agentxchain_step
tools.description: Execute a single governed turn step in AgentXchain. Dispatches the prompt to the assigned agent, collects the result, and stages it for governance validation.

working_directory.description: Path to the governed project directory

flags.description: Additional CLI flags to pass to agentxchain step (e.g., '--auto-approve')

tools.name: agentxchain_accept_turn
tools.description: Accept the current turn's result in AgentXchain. Validates the staged turn against the protocol (schema, challenge requirements, budget) and records it in the governed history.

working_directory.description: Path to the governed project directory

tools.name: agentxchain_approve_transition
tools.description: Approve a phase gate transition in AgentXchain. Evaluates gate conditions and advances the run to the next phase if all conditions are met.

working_directory.description: Path to the governed project directory

flags.description: Additional CLI flags (e.g., '--force' to bypass gate evaluation)
